info.name: FIT4110 Lab05 Compose Verification
info.description: End-to-end Postman collection for the Lab 05 Docker Compose stack: API, PostgreSQL readiness and AI service.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('API health status is ok', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(json.service).to.eql('iot-ingestion'); });

item.name: GET API readiness verifies DB and AI

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Readiness is ready', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ready'); });
pm.test('DB and AI dependencies are ready', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.db.ready).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.ai.ready).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('AI health status is ok', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(json.service).to.eql('ai-service'); });

item.name: POST AI predict returns dummy inference

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Prediction schema is valid', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(json.objects).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.confidence).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('model_version'); });
pm.test('Status code is 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('Response follows created-reading schema', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.reading_id).to.match(/^R-[0-9]{8}-[0-9]{4}$/); pm.expect(json.accepted).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.metric).to.eql('temperature'); });
const created = pm.response.json();
pm.environment.set('createdReadingId', created.reading_id);

item.name: GET latest readings returns saved reading

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Response has items array with saved reading', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); const saved = pm.environment.get('createdReadingId'); pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.items.map(item => item.reading_id)).to.include(saved); });

item.name: GET reading by saved reading_id returns 200

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response reading_id matches saved variable', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.reading_id).to.eql(pm.environment.get('createdReadingId')); });

item.name: POST reading without token returns 401 ProblemDetails

exec: pm.test('Missing token returns 401', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });

pm.test('ProblemDetails schema is present', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.include.keys(['type', 'title', 'status', 'detail']); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(401); });

item.name: POST reading with wrong token returns 401 ProblemDetails

exec: pm.test('Wrong token returns 401', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });

pm.test('ProblemDetails schema is present', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.include.keys(['type', 'title', 'status', 'detail']); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(401); });

item.name: POST reading missing device_id returns 422 ProblemDetails

exec: pm.test('Missing required field returns 422', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(422); });

pm.test('ProblemDetails schema is present', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.include.keys(['type', 'title', 'status', 'detail']); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(422); });

item.name: POST reading with value as string returns 422 ProblemDetails

exec: pm.test('Wrong data type returns 422', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(422); });

pm.test('ProblemDetails schema is present', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.include.keys(['type', 'title', 'status', 'detail']); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(422); });

item.name: POST boundary temperature 80 is accepted with warning

exec: pm.test('Boundary value 80 returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('High temperature response includes warning header', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.headers.has('X-Warning')).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Boundary value 81 returns 422', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(422); });

pm.test('ProblemDetails schema is present', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.include.keys(['type', 'title', 'status', 'detail']); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(422); });
